**Darwin Run — 2026-03-02 20:13 CET**

Sessions scanned: 3 | Facts added: **6** | Facts skipped: 0

New facts this window:
- **Mealie** is live at `hrana.stopar.si`, used for recipe & meal planning — Luka now has 16 recipes imported
- **OpenClaw** config confirmed: `tools.agentToAgent.enabled=true`, `tools.sessions.visibility=all` (Darwin visibility fix applied today)
- **Darwin** now has confirmed access to all agent sessions

Note: Thread 761 (M365 email session with rich facts about IJS, IAIO, SUPERVIEW, EdgeTech) had all its messages pre-dating the last-run cutoff — a retroactive pass would capture that history.

**Darwin Run — 2026-03-02 20:18 CET**

Sessions scanned: 3 | Facts added: **12** | Facts skipped: 0

New facts this window: Luka Stopar confirmed working at **EdgeTech** (email luka.stopar@edgetech.si) and affiliated with **IJS**; EdgeTech's M365 tenant ID captured; EdgeTech team members added (Luis Rei, Maja Škrjanc, Joao Pita Costa, Miro Budimir); **IAIO** project linked to Matej Kovačič (IRCAI) and coordinated by Luka; Luka has an active **Mistral AI Studio** subscription; and a second unknown M365 tenant (`4b2e4b13-...`) was authenticated — identity not yet resolved (possibly IJS).

Note: most of these are backfilled facts from the delivery mirror that prior runs had missed due to the session visibility config being fixed only today.

**Darwin Nightly Run — 2026-03-03 02:00 CET**

Sessions scanned: 5 | Facts added: **12** | Facts skipped: 0

New facts this window: **Luka confirmed on New Outlook for Mac** (no export support); **M365 Email Triage cron updated** (informational emails now archived, own sent emails skipped, all emails include Outlook links); **Mealie** grew to 18 recipes (Sipin golaž + Brancin iz pečice added); **Keynes** agent captured as a planned trading/financial analysis agent spawned by lstopar-agent using the T212 API; **David Berdajs** linked to Makerspace Ljubljana; **Andy Brodnik** linked to IJS.

Noteworthy: EdgeTech's initial team meeting (Mar 3, 17:30) was canceled — Iztok couldn't attend — Doodle poll circulated for reschedule. FURS tax levy notice received by Luka (sensitive, logged in memory only). Second M365 account export remains blocked pending admin consent.

**Darwin Nightly Run — 2026-03-04 02:00 CET**

Sessions scanned: 0 | Facts added: 0 | Facts skipped: 0

Only sessions active in the last 24h were Darwin's own cron and Telegram delivery sessions — no user conversations to extract from. Previously tracked lstopar-agent threads and main Telegram were idle. Graph unchanged from yesterday's 25-entity baseline. State saved; back tomorrow at 02:00.
